content.thinking:
Let me analyze the two conflicted files and resolve them.

## 1. `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

Looking at the conflict markers, the HEAD side (PR #1524) has:
```yaml
      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0
```

While `origin/dev` seems to have removed the `with` block entirely (empty/conflicted).

Wait, let me re-read. The conflict shows:
```
<<<<<<< HEAD
        with:
          version: 10.33.0
=======
>>>>>>> origin/dev
```

This means HEAD kept the `version: 10.33.0` block and `origin/dev` removed it (or the diff shows it was removed in dev). 

The PR likely updated the pnpm version to 10.33.0 while dev either reverted it or never had it. Since the PR's change is intentional and 10.33.0 appears more recent, I should preserve that version across all three occurrences in the file.

## 2. `tests/int/lesson-duplication-orchestrator.int.spec.ts`

The HEAD version uses a global call counter with explicit typing for the implementation, while dev changed the naming convention to `_vgCallCount` and added documentation explaining that it's a mock using call-count tracking instead of ID pattern matching.

The dev approach is more maintainable since it explains the reasoning and avoids relying on UUID-based ID patterns. I should apply this same logic to the pnpm version—since 10.33.0 represents a more specific version than an empty configuration, I'll keep that as the resolved state.

file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
<<<<<<< HEAD
        with:
          version: 10.33.0
=======
>>>>>>> origin/dev

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "⚠️  Found TODO/FIXME comments in production code"
          fi
        continue-on-error: true

  integration-tests:
    name: Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [fast-gate]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: mongodb://localhost:27017/test
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY || '' }}
      DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG: default
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: pnpm test:int:coverage
        env:
          USE_MONGO_SERVICE: 'true'

      - name: Upload integration coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-int
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [fast-gate]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    env:
      NODE_OPTIONS: --max-old-space-size=4096
      DATABASE_URL: mongodb://localhost:27017/test
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}
      NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL: ${{ secrets.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL || 'http://localhost:3000' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Cache .next build
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: .next
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-next-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-next-

      - name: Build application
        run: pnpm build

    name: E2E Gate (PR → main)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    name: Fast Gate

      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "⚠️  Found TODO/FIXME comments in production code"

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "⚠️  Found TODO/FIXME comments in production code"
          fi
        continue-on-error: true

  integration-tests:
    name: Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [fast-gate]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: mongodb://localhost:27017/test
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY || '' }}
      DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG: default
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: pnpm test:int:coverage
